---
title: "*GoFailMe* reviewed in *American Journal of Sociology*"
date: "2024-11-01"
categories: [recognition]
---

My book [*GoFailMe: The Unfulfilled Promise of Digital Crowdfunding*](/book/) (Stanford University Press) was reviewed by Anne Kovalainen in the [*American Journal of Sociology*](https://doi.org/10.1086/731290).

> Schneiderhan and Lukk provide a highly interesting and original analysis of how crowdfunding sites, like other for-profit and technological solutions, fail to address social inequality as a structural phenomenon and instead conflate it with individual narratives, reshaping at the same time the future forms of charity in society.

> **Citation.** Kovalainen, Anne. 2024. Review of *GoFailMe: The Unfulfilled Promise of Digital Crowdfunding*, by Erik Schneiderhan and Martin Lukk. *American Journal of Sociology* 130(3).
